catalog_entry.summary: This document is a Product User Manual for Arctic Ocean Sea and Ice Surface Temperature Products, detailing specifications and usage information for SEAICE_ARC_SEAICE_L4_NRT_OBSERVATIONS_011_008 and SEAICE_ARC_PHY_SST-IST_L3S_NRT_011_022 products.

product_line.name: Arctic Sea Ice and Surface Temperature Observations
